title: SEC-002 Binary Build Evidence Schema
description: Evidence schema for TSK-P2-W8-SEC-002 PostgreSQL native Ed25519 verification primitive. Captures binary build, install, load, and runtime verification proof.

git_sha.description: Git commit SHA of the source tree

status.description: Evidence status - partial if any verification step failed, admissible only if all steps passed

pkglibdir.description: PostgreSQL package library directory where wave8_crypto.so is installed

sharedir.description: PostgreSQL shared directory where extension control and SQL files are installed

corpus_checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the source corpus (all .c, .control, .sql, Makefile files)

ldd_output.description: Output of ldd wave8_crypto.so showing libsodium linkage

nm_output.description: Output of nm -D wave8_crypto.so | grep ed25519_verify showing exported symbol

objdump_output.description: Output of objdump -T wave8_crypto.so showing dynamic symbol table

readelf_output.description: Output of readelf -d wave8_crypto.so showing dynamic section

create_extension_output.description: Output of CREATE EXTENSION wave8_crypto command

known_good_result.description: Result of known-good vector test (should be true)

known_bad_result.description: Result of known-bad vector test (should be false)

parity_subset_results.description: Parity subset results matching SEC-001 test vectors

total_vectors.description: Total number of parity vectors tested

passed.description: Number of vectors that passed parity check

failed.description: Number of vectors that failed parity check

command_outputs.description: Raw outputs of all verification commands

build.description: Output of make PG_CONFIG=... build command

install.description: Output of make PG_CONFIG=... install command

execution_trace.description: Chronological trace of verification steps executed

step.description: Step identifier (e.g., toolchain_check, build, install, load, verify)
